prompt_text:
I'm going to describe two scenarios. In the memory scenario, a novel object called a twix has a property: it can be activated by pressing the button at a specific position on it. Your job is to figure out which object in the perception scenario is the twix-analog, and therefore which button on it activates it.

Memory scenario: There are 6 objects on a table: a moob, a nop, a xav, a rask, a tunk, and a twix. The moob is underneath the nop. The nop is to-the-left-of the xav. The xav is above the rask. The rask is to-the-right-of the tunk. The tunk is underneath the twix. The moob has a purple button on top, a cyan button on side, and a red button on bottom. The nop has a purple button on top, a cyan button on side, and a red button on bottom. The xav has a pink button on top, a brown button on side, and a green button on bottom. The rask has a cyan button on top, a purple button on side, and a red button on bottom. The tunk has a brown button on top, a pink button on side, and a green button on bottom. The twix has a blue button on top, a black button on side, and a orange button on bottom. Pressing the button on the top of the twix activates it.

Perception scenario: There are 6 objects on a shelf: a dask, a ikk, a brall, a nurp, a zant, and a zop. The nurp is underneath the zop. The zop is to-the-left-of the zant. The zant is above the ikk. The ikk is to-the-right-of the dask. The dask is underneath the brall. The dask has a brown button on top, a green button on side, and a pink button on bottom. The ikk has a pink button on top, a green button on side, and a brown button on bottom. The brall has a cyan button on top, a purple button on side, and a red button on bottom. The nurp has a brown button on top, a pink button on side, and a green button on bottom. The zant has a pink button on top, a brown button on side, and a green button on bottom. The zop has a blue button on top, a black button on side, and a orange button on bottom.

Which object in the perception scenario is the twix-analog, and which button activates it? Answer as a fenced JSON block with keys `analog` and `button_color`.
